mapper.select: select max(next_token) from jky_ding_lims_customer order by next_token desc
mapper.insert:
INSERT into jky_ding_lims_customer( user_id, creator_user_id, create_time, contact_name, contact_union_id, instance_id, modify_time, next_token, mobile ) VALUES
(#{item.userId},#{item.creatorUserId},#{item.createTime},#{item.contactName},#{item.contactUnionId}, #{item.instanceId},#{item.modifyTime},#{item.nextToken},#{item.mobile})
